title: Thriller Bark’s Zombies Awaken: Turning Point
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #2, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #25, Brook, Unknown person #18 as the scene develops across pages 13–16.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #2, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #25, Brook, focusing on the immediate stakes of thriller bark’s zombies awaken: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Are the preparations for the ceremony finished?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I can't think about anything but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: I see. So they were transported here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Hey!! It's been damaged quite a bit!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: It's full of muddy foot- prints.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Huh!! So there still might be more!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There are no zombies around, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: First, what about the essential ones...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: They are nowhere to be found...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They were completely decorated by the zombies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: A beautiful swordswoman has come with meat!!!

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #2, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #25, Brook, focusing on the immediate stakes of thriller bark’s zombies awaken: turning point.
